item.title: Kotlin Toolchain - Tue May 19 18:20:54 UTC 2026
item.description:
Provides support for Amper project configuration and build tool. Learn more on amper.org. The plugin supports basic functionality such opening Amper projects in the...
vendor: JetBrains s.r.o. downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: org.jetbrains.kotlin-toolchain
